title: The New Gearshift
description: tech-focused modpack based on create & ae2. Includes  custom recipes for most creative modded items. NeoForge 1.21.1
body:
## Tech based modpack where you can go from a steampunk vibe to a cyberpunk one.

### Features

- **Create** - Well known for its endless posibilities, this would be your steampunk age.
- **Create: craft & additions** - want to generate FE from SU? this is the way.
- **Iron furnaces** - a good way to bulk cook your items
- **sophisticated backpacks** - a backpack can never be missing
- **sophisticated storage** - good early storage
- **ae2** - you will start going on the cyberpunk route with this mod. Digital storage, autocrafting, you name it
- **mekanism** - automatization at its finest.
- **creative items** - with a couple nether stars, you can craft create creative items pretty easily.
- **On the biomes we've gone** - enjoy a new terrain generation.


**This pack is not meant to be a challenge, but a relaxing way to play with these mods. Enjoy your journey, craft a beautiful world, and dont stress by resources, you can have an infite amount of them 😊**


-------------------------------------------

### Known issues

create & addons seems to have compatibilty issues with other mods, such as kubejs.For that matter, create related mods wont be updated
